# Dor Tzabari

> Business Development Director with 8+ years experience building and driving GTM strategies in early-stage startups.

## About

Dor Tzabari builds at the intersection of AI and product. He is interested in how language models change the way software gets made, used, and understood.

A GTM operator who builds from scratch. Over 8+ years he has taken products from early traction to enterprise adoption: qualified pipeline, paid POCs, and long-term commercial partnerships across the US, EMEA, and APAC.

Former IDF Captain (Yahalom — Combat Engineering Unit for Special Operations).

Lately: building agentic systems on his own BD pipeline, using AI at the edge of what's possible.

## Experience

### Business Development Director — DriveU.auto (2020–Present)
Provider of teleoperation and autonomy for vehicles, deployed across global autonomous fleets.
- Built and executed global GTM strategy across US, EMEA, and APAC; scaled pipeline to $5M+ in potential ACV
- Led end-to-end sales cycles: 10 paid POCs and 4 multi-year commercial agreements ($300K–$1.5M)
- Configured OpenClaw — an open-source agent runtime — for a non-standard BD outbound use case at DriveU, repurposed as the enrichment + first-touch engine
- Built proprietary account intelligence database of 600+ organizations
- Cultivated C-level relationships at CES, MWC, Manifest

### Co-Founder & CEO — Greener Israel (2017–2020)
Smart-waste / smart-city platform; sole distributor of Bigbelly in Israel; flagship deployment with Tel Aviv Municipality across the entire Rothschild Boulevard.
- Full company buildout from founding through market entry (product, GTM, ops, legal)
- Flagship deployment with Tel Aviv Municipality on Rothschild Boulevard
- Negotiated sole-source vendor designation, eliminating competitive tender
- Raised $100K in pre-seed funding

## Military

Officer (Captain), Yahalom — IDF Combat Engineering Unit for Special Operations (2011–2016)
- Commanded a team of 20 soldiers through complex, high-stakes operations
- Founded and led a technological R&D unit

## Education

Computer Science — The Open University of Israel

## Projects

### bdr-agent
Production AI sales-development pipeline for a B2B startup, built as 6 n8n workflows.
- Slack-approval interactivity with idempotent state management
- AI correction loop using GPT-4.1 with debounce + schedule sweeps
- ICP scoring with arithmetic safety net
- Free-text command routing in a Slack channel
- Built one node at a time to understand every piece

### openclaw — configured for BD outbound
Non-standard use case design over OpenClaw (https://openclaw.ai), an open-source multi-channel agent runtime. Repurposed multi-channel routing as the enrichment + first-touch engine for a single-person BD function in production.
- Recognized fit between an open-source runtime designed for chat and a BD function that needed agentic infrastructure
- Configured platform defaults to serve a BD-outbound use case the platform wasn't marketed for
- Production deployment on Dor's own pipeline

## Skills

Business: GTM Strategy, Enterprise Sales, Strategic Alliances, C-Level Engagement, Pipeline Architecture, Product-Market Fit, Fundraising, Channel Development
Technical: AI Sales Automation, LLM Research & Enrichment, Prompt Engineering, Sales Enablement Automation, n8n workflow design, Open-source agent runtime configuration
Tools: HubSpot, Salesforce, Apollo, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, JIRA, Claude Code, ChatGPT, Perplexity, n8n, OpenClaw
